_meta.author: Ali-Hussein-dev
_meta.title: Card
_meta.description:
A versatile card component that supports multiple design variants while maintaining consistency with the shadcn/ui design system.

Features
- 8 unique design variants
- Dark mode support
- Consistent with shadcn/ui
- Fully typed props
- Customizable through className
- Responsive design
- Animated elements (optional)
